Home.heroHeadline: The CRM for audiovisual production companies.
Home.heroSub: Manage clients, projects, crew and equipment from one place. Built for LATAM.
Home.socialLabel: Used by production companies in Argentina, Mexico and Chile
Home.problemHeadline: Still using Excel and WhatsApp to run your production company?
Home.problemSub: 78% of independent production companies in LATAM manage their operations with tools that weren't built for this.

problems.title: Clients scattered across spreadsheets
problems.desc: Contacts in spreadsheets, emails without follow-up, opportunities lost because nobody remembers the next step.

problems.title: Projects coordinated over WhatsApp
problems.desc: No visibility into real project status, no accessible history, always depending on a chat group.

problems.title: Crew chaos at payroll time
problems.desc: Searching for each technician's tax ID at payment time, duplicating data across projects, errors in contracts.

Home.featuresHeadline: Everything you need, in one place.
Home.featuresSub: Klapr integrates the tools your production company needs — without the ones it doesn't.

features.title: CRM & Clients
features.desc: Visual pipeline with complete client history. Never lose an audiovisual lead again.

features.title: Project Kanban
features.desc: Organize every project with drag & drop. Custom stages and full visibility of your production pipeline.

features.title: Schedule & Follow-up
features.desc: Integrated calendar with automatic reminders. Coordinate shoots, meetings, and deliveries in one place.

features.title: Team & Crew
features.desc: Crew database with Argentine legal fields (DNI/CUIL). Export Excel sheets ready for contracts.

features.title: Suppliers
features.desc: Technical supplier database with cost history per project. Budgets without friction.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.desc: Generate proposals, budgets, and commercial emails with Claude AI. Save hours on admin tasks.

Pricing.headline: Pricing that scales with your production company.
Pricing.sub: Start free. No credit card. Grow when you're ready.
Pricing.ctaHeadline: Not sure which plan to choose?
Pricing.ctaSub: Start with Starter for free and upgrade when you need to. No friction, no data loss.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.desc: To start organizing your production company at no cost.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.desc: For production companies that want to professionalize.

tiers.name: Studio
tiers.desc: For studios and large production teams.

faq.q: Can I start free without a credit card?
faq.a: Yes. The Starter plan is 100% free and doesn't require any payment method. You can use it for as long as you want.

faq.q: Does Klapr work with Argentine pesos and US dollars?
faq.a: Yes. Klapr supports multi-currency: you can manage projects in ARS, USD, MXN, and CLP. Budgets adapt to each project's currency.

faq.q: Can I export my crew data for contracts?
faq.a: Yes. In all plans you can export your crew database to Excel including Argentine legal fields like DNI, CUIL, and birthdate — ready for contracts and payroll.

faq.q: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
faq.a: Your account automatically reverts to the Starter plan. You don't lose any data — some advanced features just become inaccessible until you renew.

faq.q: Is there a discount for large teams or agencies?
faq.a: Yes. If you have more than 10 users or manage more than 3 production companies, contact us at hola@klapr.com for a custom plan with special pricing.

Features.headerSub: Every module was designed with the real workflow of an independent production company in LATAM in mind.
Features.ctaSub: No credit card. No time limit on the Starter plan.

modules.title: CRM & Clients
modules.headline: All your clients, in one place.
modules.problem: Your clients are scattered across WhatsApp, a spreadsheet, and your memory. When someone from the team needs the contact for 'that brand from last year', nobody knows where to look.
modules.desc: Klapr centralizes every client, agency, and brand in one searchable database. Each record has full contact info, billing data, relationship history, and every project you've done together — so your whole team is always on the same page.
bullets: Complete contact profiles with billing info, notes, and tags
Full project history per client — revenues, dates, status
Quick search and filters to find any client in seconds

modules.title: Project Kanban
modules.headline: Your production pipeline, always clear.
modules.problem: You're managing five productions at once and tracking status over WhatsApp threads. Things fall through the cracks and nobody knows what's blocked.
modules.desc: Each production job lives on a Kanban board with drag-and-drop cards you can move through custom stages: Brief, Quote Sent, Pre-production, Shoot, Post-production, Delivered, Invoiced. At a glance you see every active project and where it's stuck.
bullets: Drag-and-drop kanban with fully customizable stages
One card per job with client, budget, dates, and assigned team
Filter by client, status, or date range

modules.title: Schedule & Follow-up
modules.headline: No follow-up slips through the cracks.
modules.problem: Follow-ups get forgotten. That client you quoted three weeks ago never heard back from you because the reminder was a sticky note that fell off your monitor.
modules.desc: Klapr's schedule lets you log every interaction — calls, emails, meetings, quotes — and set follow-up reminders so nothing slips. See your week at a glance and know exactly who needs attention today.
bullets: Log calls, emails, and meetings per client or project
Follow-up reminders with due dates and priority
Weekly calendar view of all upcoming touchpoints

modules.title: Team & Crew
modules.headline: Your crew database, always ready.
modules.problem: Every production you rebuild your crew database from scratch — scrolling through phone contacts and old WhatsApp threads to find the DP you used eight months ago.
modules.desc: Your full crew database in one place. Each profile has rates, availability, skills, and all the Argentine legal fields needed for contracts and insurance: DNI, CUIL, birthdate. Export any crew list directly to Excel for accounting or legal — formatted and ready to send.
bullets: Crew profiles with rates, skills, and availability
DNI / CUIL / birthdate for Argentine contracts and insurance exports
One-click Excel export formatted for accounting

modules.title: Suppliers
modules.headline: Your technical supplier network, organized.
modules.problem: Renting equipment means calling three different rental houses, cross-referencing quotes in a spreadsheet, and hoping you didn't forget to book the crane.
modules.desc: Keep your full supplier network — rental houses, post-production facilities, studios — with equipment lists, pricing, and contact info. Attach suppliers to specific jobs to track costs per production and compare vendors over time.
bullets: Supplier database with equipment catalogs and pricing
Assign suppliers to jobs to track production costs
Equipment serial numbers for insurance and asset export

modules.title: AI Assistant
modules.headline: Draft in seconds what used to take hours.
modules.problem: Writing a creative proposal, a budget breakdown, or a professional follow-up email takes time you don't have — and staring at a blank page at 11pm is the worst part of the job.
modules.desc: Klapr's built-in AI assistant (powered by Claude) understands audiovisual production. Ask it to draft a creative proposal, estimate a budget for a two-day shoot, write a follow-up email in the right tone, or generate a pre-production checklist. You can even attach a PDF brief and ask it to analyze it directly.
bullets: Generate proposals, budgets, and emails in seconds
Context-aware: knows your current section and active projects
Attach PDF briefs — the assistant reads and analyzes them

mockLabels.userMsg: I need a proposal for 3 spots for a clothing brand.
mockLabels.aiMsg: Sure, I'll draft the proposal. Do you have visual references or a defined brand palette?

comingSoonItems.title: Budget Generator
comingSoonItems.desc: AI-powered production budget builder with line items, crew rates, equipment costs, and USD/ARS conversion.

comingSoonItems.title: Proposal Generator
comingSoonItems.desc: Full creative proposals with brand identity, treatment, and pricing — exported to PDF.

comingSoonItems.title: Call Sheets × Gmail
comingSoonItems.desc: Auto-generated call sheets sent directly via Gmail to the full crew list.

comingSoonItems.title: Tasks × Google Calendar
comingSoonItems.desc: Two-way sync of production tasks and deadlines with Google Calendar.
